meta.source: Homeowners insurance ESTIMATE. State average annual premiums: Quadrant Information Services 2026 (normalized to $300k dwelling, HO-3) cross-checked vs NAIC 2022 actual-paid (via III). Catastrophe uplifts merged from two independent research passes; applied dampened (x0.4, cap 1.5) so coastal/wildfire ZIPs differentiate without double-counting cat exposure already in state averages.
meta.disclaimer: Estimated annual premium scaled from the state average to the home value, adjusted for ZIP catastrophe risk. This is a payment-planning ESTIMATE, not an insurance quote — actual premium depends on the property, coverage, deductible, claims history, and a carrier quote.

catastropheUplift.region: South & Southeast Florida coast (Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, Monroe/Keys) and FL Gulf coast
Louisiana & Mississippi/Alabama Gulf coast (New Orleans, Houma, Gulfport/Biloxi, Mobile)
Texas Gulf coast (Houston/Galveston, Corpus Christi, Brownsville)
Carolinas Atlantic coast (Charleston, Myrtle Beach, Outer Banks, Wilmington)
California Wildland-Urban Interface (Sierra foothills, North Bay, SoCal canyons, Malibu/Palisades, Paradise/Butte)
Tornado Alley / hail-prone Plains (Oklahoma, Kansas, Nebraska, eastern Colorado, North Texas, SD, Iowa metros)
